member.name: P:Mafi.Base.BaseModConfig.BuildStartingFactory
member.summary: Whether a test factory will be built on the game start.

member.name: P:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.Billboard.HasCustomColor
member.summary: Whether this billboard has custom colors set by the player. Default (unserialized) colors have alpha 0, while player-set colors always have alpha 255.

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.Billboard.SetConfigColors(Mafi.Core.Entities.EntityConfigData,Mafi.ColorRgba,Mafi.ColorRgba)
member.summary: Sets billboard color data on an so that it is applied when the entity is created.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.DecorationEntity
member.summary: A purely decorative layout entity with no ports and no pausable behavior.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.ThermalStorages.ThermalStorageProto.Capacity
member.summary: Capacity is defined as the total quantity of product (e.g. hp steam) this storage can output. So its thermal capacity changes based on product stored. The reason is that if this can store 1 ton of 300 degrees salt it can store 1 ton of 600 degrees salt. Also if we wouldn't have this, pipes would get more advantage for super press steam.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.WaterFloatingDecoration
member.summary: A decorative entity that floats on water and wobbles.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.BillboardProto.CHARACTERS
member.summary: All supported billboard characters with their safe file/ID names. Characters that are file-safe use themselves as the name; others get a safe alias prefixed with '_'.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.BillboardProto.DefaultPrimaryColor
member.summary: Default primary color for the color picker (before saturation compression is applied).

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.BillboardProto.DefaultSecondaryColor
member.summary: Default secondary color for the color picker (before saturation compression is applied).

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.BillboardsManager.m_pendingColorChanges
member.summary: Billboards whose colors changed since the last sync. Read and cleared by the rendering side on the main thread during sync update.

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.BillboardsManager.NotifyColorChanged(Mafi.Core.EntityId)
member.summary: Called by to mark the billboard for a renderer refresh.

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.BillboardsManager.DrainPendingColorChanges(Mafi.Collections.Lyst{Mafi.Core.EntityId})
member.summary: Drains the pending color changes list. Called by the rendering side on the main thread.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.DecorationProto
member.summary: Proto for a purely decorative layout entity with no ports and no functional behavior.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.WaterFloatingDecorationProto
member.summary: Proto for a decorative entity that floats on water and wobbles. Implements so the GPU terrain pose system computes the entity's 3D pose from ocean displacement, matching actual wave height.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.TombOfCaptainsProto.MinUnityForFirePerMonth
member.summary: Unity gain (or loss) when flowers are at 0%.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.TombOfCaptainsProto.MaxUnityForFirePerMonth
member.summary: Unity gain when flowers are at 100%.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.TombOfCaptainsProto.MinUnityForFlowersPerMonth
member.summary: Unity gain (or loss) when fire is at 0%.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Buildings.TombOfCaptainsProto.MaxUnityForFlowersPerMonth
member.summary: Unity gain when fire is at 100%.

member.name: P:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Machines.PowerGenerators.MechPowerGeneratorFromProduct.Efficiency
member.summary: Efficiency based on .

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Machines.PowerGenerators.ElectricityGeneratorFromMechPowerProto.MinUtilization
member.summary: Utilization where the production reaches zero.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Machines.PowerGenerators.ElectricityGeneratorFromMechPowerProto.Gfx.SoundPrefabPath
member.summary: The sound the generator makes while it is operating.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Machines.PowerGenerators.ElectricityGeneratorFromProductProto.BufferCapacityMultiplier
member.summary: Multiplier of input quantity to determine buffer size.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Machines.PowerGenerators.ElectricityGeneratorFromProductProto.OutputProduct
member.summary: Empty if there is no output product

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Machines.PowerGenerators.ElectricityGeneratorFromProductProto.Gfx.ParticlesParams
member.summary: Parameters for particles.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Machines.PowerGenerators.ElectricityGeneratorFromProductProto.Gfx.SoundPrefabPath
member.summary: The sound the generator makes while it is operating.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Machines.PowerGenerators.FlyWheelEntityProto.Gfx.SoundPrefabPath
member.summary: The sound the generator makes while it is operating.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Machines.PowerGenerators.MechPowerGeneratorFromProductProto.EfficiencyIncPerTick
member.summary: How much efficiency per tick is gained when the generator has input. This also consumes extra resources.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Machines.PowerGenerators.MechPowerGeneratorFromProductProto.EfficiencyDecPerTick
member.summary: How much efficiency is lost when the generator has no input or is turned off.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Machines.PowerGenerators.MechPowerGeneratorFromProductProto.Gfx.SoundPrefabPath
member.summary: The sound the generator makes while it is operating.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Machines.CropsData
member.remarks:
Note for water consumption: Crops should consume MORE THAN 0.2 and LESS THAN 2 water per day. Farms accumulate 2 quantity of water per rainy day (4 per heavy rain). If crop takes more than 2, soil water level will be decreasing on farm during rain. Farm without crop has 0.2 water/day evaporation, greenhouses are half of that at 0.1 per day.
This also means that for each 1 month of rain the farm will get 60 water.
Note for fertility consumption: Crops should consume LESS THAN 0.4% fertility per day. Farms regenerate 0.6% of missing fertility per day. This means that if farm is all the way at 0 fertility, it will regenerate 0.6% fertility per day. Given that crops without rotation will add 50% fertility penalty, no crop should have higher fertility consumption than 0.4%, otherwise they will drain farm all the way to zero fertility.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Machines.FarmsData.FARM_FERTILITY_REPLENISH
member.summary: How much of missing fertility is replenished every day. WARNING: This value hugely affects farms balance.

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Messages.GoalsData.RegisterData(Mafi.Core.Mods.ProtoRegistrator)
member.summary:
Some information on backward compatibility and changes.
To remove GoalListProto leave an empty stub (and remove references to it) + add isObsolete and filter it out in GoalsManager To remove a goal from GoalListProto, keep it there but implement isObsolete = true + add code to filter it out in GoalList To add a goal to GoalListProto, just add it + add code to rescan new Goals on load in GoalList
Triggers Triggers are not saved, so you can change trigger anytime, if you don't mind that older game version still use old ones. If you need to change old version as well, do the following: - Add new trigger and increase its version by 1 - Enabled initSelf in GoalList to replace trigger on version change
Well at least in theory this should all work. Not tested.

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationFuel.refreshBufferCapacities
member.summary: Refreshes buffer capacities to match the current proto fuel definitions. Needed after proto balancing changes so existing buildings pick up new capacities.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationFuelSetFuelCmd.PrimaryFuelId
member.summary: null to clear

member.name: P:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationModule.IsForLoading
member.summary: Whether this station module is set for loading (default) or unloading by the player.

member.name: P:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationModule.HasUnloadWagonRequest
member.summary: True when a wagon is currently aligned to this module for unloading, regardless of whether the buffer can actually accept the cargo right now.

member.name: P:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationModule.IsBalancingDisabled
member.summary: When true, this module will not push products to adjacent station modules.

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationModule.ClearAssignedProduct
member.summary: Clears currently assigned products.

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationModule.QuickRemoveProducts
member.summary: Clears currently assigned products and consumes the Unity cost to quick remove them.

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationModule.TryAssignProduct(Mafi.Core.Products.ProductProto)
member.summary: Tries to assign product to this module and returns true on success. Also matches this module's direction to any existing module in the same station group that already has this product assigned.

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationModule.sendOutputs
member.summary: Sends contents of output buffers to output ports.

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationModule.RequestWagonLoad(Mafi.Core.Trains.CargoWagon.SubCargoWagon,System.Predicate{Mafi.Core.Products.ProductProto},System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Should be called repeatedly when a wagon is aligned and wishes to load. After calling at least once the wagon must be released by TryReleaseWagon or invalid states will occur.

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationModule.RequestWagonUnload(Mafi.Core.Trains.CargoWagon.SubCargoWagon,System.Predicate{Mafi.Core.Products.ProductProto},System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Should be called repeatedly when a wagon is aligned and wishes to unload. After calling at least once the wagon must be released by TryReleaseWagon or invalid states will occur.

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationRoot.Cheat_AddLinkedStorageRaw(Mafi.Core.Buildings.Storages.StorageBase)
member.summary: Test-only: forces this storage into the linked list, bypassing the single-station guard so the recovery init pass can be exercised against a deliberately-broken state. Do not call from production code.

member.name: P:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationWaypoint.Pillars
member.summary: NOTE: This is empty during the entityAdded callback for the track.

member.name: P:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationWaypoint.NetworkWaitingBayRefCount
member.summary: Tracks how many networks use this as a waiting bay. Updated from calls by the networks, and recreated on load by the network manager.

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationWaypoint.StartDeconstructionIfCan
member.summary: Starts deconstruction. Does not create products if it'll be replaced by a track below.

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationWaypoint.AddPillarOnlyInfo(Mafi.Core.Trains.TrainTrackPillarInfoRel)
member.summary: For use when we don't actually want a pillar (e.g. we're on the ground) but we want to be able to add a pillar in this location should we be copy-pasted above ground.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationFuelProto.TransferPeriod
member.summary: Duration to transfer one unit of cargo.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationFuelProto.FuelDefinition.WasteProduct
member.summary: Waste product produced when fuel is transferred. Quantity defines the output buffer capacity. One unit of waste is produced per one unit of primary fuel transferred.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationModuleProto.TransferPeriod
member.summary: Duration to transfer one batch of cargo.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationModuleProto.TransferQuantity
member.summary: Amount of cargo transferred per period

member.name: P:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationModuleProto.StorableProducts
member.summary: Products that can be stored in the storage. Serves mainly for the players so they can choose from some list what to assign.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainStationModuleProto.Gfx.ParticlesParamsForLoading
member.summary: Parameters for particles.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Trains.TrainTracksData
member.summary: Defines train track pieces.
member.remarks: Train track pieces and curve radii were carefully selected based following criteria: * All pieces must start and end at integer tile coordinate. This is especially limiting for turns. * Steepest grade is 1:8 to be whole multiple of terrain designations and to allow relatively quick changes of elevation. * Smallest turn radius was selected to be 14 tiles since it is the smallest radius for which 10 tile wagons still work and circular track created from 16 pieces is not too potato-shaped (R18 was way too much potato). * The length of R14 45 deg turn has length of 11 tiles, which is kind of close to 8 tiles for the steepest grade. * Next radius was selected to be 22 tiles since it is sufficiently different from R14 visually and its 45 deg turn has length of 17.5, close to grade 1:16. It also forms nice circle even when subdivided to 16 pieces. * Third radius was selected to be 30 tiles for similar reasons to other radii above. * All start/end nodes that have non-zero gradient are half-tile higher. This helps to make ramp start/end half the length and it also eliminates need for special piece that is both ramp start and ramp end (one height difference).

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Bridges.BridgesData.BridgeTypeEnum
member.summary: Unique identifier for each bridge type.

member.param: (optional) Extra height (over height 0) to occupy. Uses the same coordinates as the layout

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Research.IncrementalResearchData.easyCostFnLvl100(System.Int64,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Easy cost function, ~100 levels are achievable, but not over ~200.
lvl cost/level ---------- 10 2x 25 4x 50 8x 100 20x ---------- soft cap 150 60x 200 200x 300 3500x

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Research.IncrementalResearchData.mediumCostFnLvl50(System.Int64,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Medium cost function, ~50 levels are achievable, but not over ~80.
lvl cost/level ---------- 10 3x 25 7x 50 22x ---------- soft cap 75 90x 100 450x 125 2300x

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Research.IncrementalResearchData.hardCostFnLvl25(System.Int64,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Hard cost function, ~25 levels are achievable, but not over ~40.
lvl cost/level ---------- 10 5x 25 20x ---------- soft cap 30 60x 45 200x 60 1300x

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Research.IncrementalResearchData.extremeCostFnLvl10(System.Int64,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Extreme cost function, ~10 levels are achievable, but not over ~18.
lvl cost/level ---------- 5 6x 10 20x ---------- soft cap 15 85x 20 420x 25 2300x

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Research.ResearchCosts
member.summary: Research costs in minutes (months) when one lab of the minimum required tier is researching.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Transport.TransportsData.CIRCLE_SHARPNESS
member.summary: This parameter makes the corners nearly exact circles. Other values look ugly.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Transport.TransportsData.SEGMENTS_COUNT
member.summary: Number of segments per curve for all transports.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Transport.TransportsData.PILLAR_RANGE
member.summary: Range of pillar (radius), same for all transports.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Transport.TransportsData.MAX_LIFT_HEIGHT_DELTA
member.summary: Height a lift can lift products. Same for all valid transports.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Prototypes.Transport.TransportsData.TRANSPORT_UV_LENGTH
member.summary: Length of transport across the texture. Transport texture will repeat after this distance.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.CustomPropsPostProcessor
member.summary: Places individual custom generated props.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.CustomTreesPostProcessor
member.summary: Places individual custom generated trees.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.FlowersPostProcessor
member.summary: Places flower locations then grows flowers in clumps.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ForestFloorPostProcessor
member.summary: Grows grass on rocks as well as spreads incompatible materials such as sand.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.GrassOnRocksPostProcessor
member.summary: Grows grass on rocks as well as spreads incompatible materials such as sand.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.LowestProcessedHeightUnderOcean
member.summary: Terrain height under the ocean that is processed for erosion.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.Seed
member.summary: Random seed that decides particles spawn positions.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.ParticlesPerTile
member.summary: How many particles per tile to simulate using this config.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.MinParticleSteps
member.summary: Minimum particle lifetime, to give it some time to gain some speed.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.MaxParticleSteps
member.summary: Max particle lifetime.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.StepLength
member.summary: Step length for the particle. Turns out that a constant step makes things

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.TerrainInteractionMult
member.summary: Multiplier for terrain interaction.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.TerrainInteractionLifetimeExponent
member.summary: Exponent applied to a sine function to reduce particle effect at start and end of its lifetime.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.ErodeSpeedThreshold
member.summary: Speed threshold at which particle will start to erode material.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.AccumulatedMaterialErodeThresholdMult
member.summary: The erode threshold is increased by the amount of material that a particle carries, multiplied by this value.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.MinSpeed
member.summary: Particle simulation will be stopped if its speed goes below this value.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.MinGradient
member.summary: Minimum gradient for early particle termination.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.MomentumFactor
member.summary: How much of the previous speed is preserved each step.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.GradientToVelocityMult
member.summary: Multiplier that converts gradient to velocity. Note that velocity is only affecting erosion, not step size.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.ExtendedGradStep
member.summary: Distance at which are extended gradients taken.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.ExtendedGradWeight
member.summary: Weight of the extended gradients. The normal gradient has weight 1.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.Friction
member.summary: Percentage of speed removed at each step.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.MaxErosionPerStep
member.summary: Maximum terrain thickness eroded per step.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.MaxSpeedDelta
member.summary: Limits a maximum speed difference per step.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.SpeedSmoothingThreshold
member.summary: At which speed a gaussian smoothing should be applied.

member.name: M:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.ParticleErosionPostProcessor.ParticleErosionConfig.GetMaxInfluenceSteps
member.summary: Returns the maximum number of influence in steps that the particle may have.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.PolygonFlattenPostProcessor
member.summary: Post processor that flattens the terrain within a polygon.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.PolygonRampPostProcessor
member.summary: Post processor that creates a ramp on the terrain defined by a polygon.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.PolygonReplaceMaterialPostProcessor
member.summary: Post processor that replaces material within a polygon.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.PolygonRestrictPlacementPostProcessor
member.summary: Post processor that clears props and trees within a polygon.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.PolygonSmoothPostProcessor
member.summary: Polygon-based post processor which smooths surrounding terrain.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.PolygonTreeGeneratorPostProcessor
member.summary: Generic polygon terrain feature. Good for generating mountains or other non-plateau features.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Terrain.PostProcessors.TerrainUnderPropsPostProcessor
member.summary: Grows grass on rocks as well as spreads incompatible materials such as sand.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Terrain.FeatureGenerators.PolygonSurfaceFeatureGenerator
member.summary: Polygon-based terrain feature that cuts the feature using a surface function to generate a plateau or similar.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Terrain.FeatureGenerators.PolygonTerrainFeatureGenerator
member.summary: Generic polygon terrain feature. Good for generating mountains or other non-plateau features.

member.name: F:Mafi.Base.Terrain.FeatureGenerators.PolygonTerrainFeatureGenerator.m_isGeneratingChunk
member.summary: For debugging. Should be false at all times except when generating chunks, where it may be false in the multi-threaded case.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.Terrain.FeatureGenerators.PolygonTerrainReplaceGenerator
member.summary: Generic polygon terrain feature. Good for generating mountains or other non-plateau features.

member.name: T:Mafi.Base.IResearchNodesData
member.summary: Simple interface to help to discover all modules that are registering research nodes.
